# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

Contributors and maintainers are expected to keep project spaces professional,
direct, and respectful. Disagreement is welcome when it is technical and specific;
harassment, personal attacks, and discriminatory behavior are not.

## Scope

This policy applies to issues, pull requests, discussions, code review, and any
project-linked communication channels.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit, hide, or remove comments and contributions that violate this
policy. Repeated or severe violations may result in blocked participation.

## Reporting

Report conduct concerns privately to the repository owner. Include links or
screenshots when possible so the issue can be reviewed accurately.
